messages.content: genera en 80 caracteres, sms de respuesta en ingles. para decirle a un hombre que quiero que me responda.
"Hey! Just wanted to check in and see if you could reply to my message when you get a chance?"
dame 10 mas,  pero sin comillas y sin contarlas con numeros.

1. Just wanted to follow up and see if you had a chance to respond to my message.
2. It would mean a lot to me if you could take a moment to reply to my message.
3. Hoping to hear back from you soon, let me know if you need anything from me.
4. I'm eager to hear your thoughts, can you please respond to my message?
5. Can you please get back to me at your earliest convenience?
6. Not sure if you saw my message, can you let me know that you received it?
7. Just checking in to see if you had a chance to read my message and respond.
8. Would appreciate it if you could get back to me, thanks!
9. Looking forward to hearing from you, please reply to my message when you can.
10. Hey there! Can you please respond to my message so we can continue the conversation?

igual pero todos de mas de 80 caracteres

1. Hey there! I was just wondering if you had a chance to respond to my message yet. Let me know when you can, thanks!
2. Hi, hope you're well! I was wondering if you could kindly respond to my message when you have some time.
3. Good morning! Just wanted to touch base and see if you could reply to my message at some point today.
4. Hey, sorry to bug you, but can you please take a moment to respond to my message? Would really appreciate it!
5. Hi, hope your day is going well! Whenever you have a chance, could you please reply to my message? Thank you!
6. Hey there, I don't mean to be a bother, but can you please respond to my message so we can keep the conversation going?
7. Hello! Just checking in to see if you could provide me with a response to my message. Looking forward to hearing from you!
8. Good afternoon! Can you please take a moment to respond to my message so we can move forward with our plans? Thank you!
9. Hey, sorry to bother you, but could you please reply to my message when you have a moment? Really appreciate it!
10. Hi, just wanted to follow up and see if you had a chance to respond to my message yet. Hope to hear from you soon!
dame 20 mas, pero se muy amable

1. Good day to you! Would you be so kind as to provide me with a response to my message when you have a moment? Thank you!
2. Hi there, hope you're doing well. Would it be possible for you to reply to my message at your earliest convenience? Thanks so much!

4. Hi (Name), I hope you're having a great day so far. I was just wondering if you could take a moment to respond to my message, it would be greatly appreciated!
